division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
chapter_title: Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title
text: A vehicle transported upon a highway, no part of which is in contact with the highway, is exempt from registration.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 1. Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title [4000 - 5506]
#### Article 1. Vehicles Subject to Registration [4000 - 4023]
##### § 4009

A vehicle transported upon a highway, no part of which is in contact with the highway, is exempt from registration.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: A vehicle transported upon a highway, no part of which is in contact with the highway, is exempt from registration.
